task: Safe-additive Block 4 — docs-upload UI on the Documents page (frontend-only, additive, no money path, no migration). The Documents page (docs.files) listed + filtered docs but had NO upload control. The docs upload backend (requestUploadUrl/confirmUpload + R2) and an UploadModal already existed but only for entity-linked uploads. Generalized components/documents/UploadModal.tsx to make entityType/entityId/entityName OPTIONAL — when omitted, requestUploadUrl is called with no entity_links = a STANDALONE document (which the page already filters for); backward-compatible for the 2 existing callers (Onboarding, Inspections). Added an 'Upload document' button to the Documents PageHeader that opens the standalone modal and refetches the list on success. No backend change; categories via existing listFileCategories() (all).
